title: CAST AI Cluster
description: A Cluster represents a Kubernetes cluster connected to and managed by the CAST AI platform for cost optimization and autoscaling.

region.description: Cloud provider region where the cluster is deployed.

clusterToken.description: Token used by the CAST AI agent to authenticate with the platform.

agentStatus.description: Status of the CAST AI agent running in the cluster.

kubernetesVersion.description: Version of Kubernetes running on the cluster.

nodeCount.description: Total number of nodes in the cluster.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the cluster was registered with CAST AI.
